title: hieracium patens subsp. eurypus
intro: Hieracium patens subsp. eurypus, also known as yellow hawkweed or Hieracium eurypus, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium patens subsp. eurypus is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety as a treatment have not been extensively scientifically studied.
